# Gabriel Raymondou

> Freelance fullstack developer specializing in web apps, AI integrations, and growth automation. Based in Cannes, France. Available for hire.

## About

Gabriel Raymondou is a fullstack developer and Marketing Software Engineer with experience building scalable acquisition systems, web applications, and custom AI-powered tools. He has co-founded two startups, led technical delivery at an AI automation agency, and works with clients across France and internationally.

## Services

- Web application development (React, Next.js, TypeScript)
- AI integration and automation (LLM APIs, custom pipelines)
- Growth engineering and acquisition systems
- Freelance consulting and project delivery

## Stack

TypeScript, React, Next.js, AWS, Vercel, Generative AI, Claude, HubSpot, SEO, GEO

## Experience

- **Freelance Web Developer** — Independent (Jan 2020 – Present): Building websites, web applications, and custom growth tools for ambitious teams. Clients across France and internationally.
- **Marketing Software Engineer** — Swile (Jan 2022 – Present): Build durable and scalable acquisition systems leveraging marketing team efforts at a leading French fintech.
- **Co-Founder** — Synergia (Oct 2024 – Jun 2025): Co-founded an AI automation agency based in Dubai. Built and delivered custom AI-based automation solutions for clients in sports, healthcare, and high luxury services.
- **Co-Founder** — Hero-Com (Sept 2019 – Dec 2019): E-commerce startup. Learned Facebook/Google Ads, conversion optimisation, and supply-chain logistics.
- **Co-Founder** — HeroGrowth (Feb 2019 – Sept 2019): Social media management agency focused on sports car and luxury brands. Managed sales, client relationships, and a team of 3 freelancers.
- **IP Support Consultant** — Questel (Sept 2016 – Aug 2018): Customer support, user training, and project management for Orbit Intelligence.

## Selected Projects

- **Growth Engineering Platform**: Built from scratch at Swile — a global platform to modernize marketing operations and dramatically increase team velocity. Powers acquisition campaigns, landing pages, and growth experiments at scale. Live at swile.co.
- **Casinoël by Swile**: A holiday-season interactive web experience for Swile: a roulette game where every player wins a gift. Implemented end-to-end from random generation logic to full animated frontend.
- **La Route des Golfs**: A marketplace to sell golf experiences across French destinations — built from scratch. Covers tee times, stays, and curated itineraries for golf tourism in France.
- **Studiz App**: A free iOS app to help students learn with a gamified approach. Create and share quizzes to learn faster and more efficiently. Live at mystudiz.com.
